_: Source of truth for the Tools section in README.md. Edit here, then run `node scripts/gen-readme-tools.mjs` (or just `bash build.sh`) to regenerate the README block. Listed tools are optional — the registry is fully usable without them.

tools.name: url-to-dataset-record
tools.what: paste a HuggingFace (or other) dataset URL → drafts a validated record matching the registry vocabularies and opens a PR appending it to `data.json`.
tools.home: maintainer-side tooling — ask for a copy
